---
title: "`r params$title`"
author: "`r params$author`"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
params:
  obj_path: ""
  title: "OmicsLens Analysis Report"
  author: ""
  pkg_root: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo       = FALSE,
  warning    = FALSE,
  message    = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 9,
  fig.height = 6,
  out.width  = "100%"
)

# Load OmicsLens: installed package first, fall back to source files
if (requireNamespace("OmicsLens", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(OmicsLens)
} else if (nzchar(params$pkg_root) && dir.exists(params$pkg_root)) {
  for (f in list.files(file.path(params$pkg_root, "R"), pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE))
    source(f)
} else {
  stop("OmicsLens not installed and pkg_root not provided. Install with devtools::install_github('priyanshpathak/OmicsLens')")
}

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(DT)
  library(plotly)
  library(survival)
  library(pheatmap)
})

obj <- readRDS(params$obj_path)
has_mofa     <- !is.null(obj$results$mofa)
has_de       <- !is.null(obj$results$de)
has_gsea     <- !is.null(obj$results$gsea)
has_dmr      <- !is.null(obj$results$dmr)
has_survival <- !is.null(obj$results$survival)
```

```{r logo-banner, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat('
<style>
.omicslens-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a6496 0%, #2c3e50 100%);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 18px 24px;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
}
.omicslens-header img {
  width: 52px;
  height: 52px;
  margin-right: 18px;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4));
}
.omicslens-header-text h1 {
  margin: 0 0 2px 0;
  font-size: 1.9em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #ffffff;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}
.omicslens-header-text p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.92em;
  color: #aed6f1;
}
</style>
<div class="omicslens-header">
  <img src="https://img.icons8.com/fluency/96/lens.png" alt="OmicsLens logo"/>
  <div class="omicslens-header-text">
    <h1>OmicsLens</h1>
    <p>Multi-omics integration &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; MOFA2 &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; DESeq2 &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; fgsea &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; Survival &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; Analysis date: ',
    format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y"), '</p>
  </div>
</div>
')
```

---

# 1. Data Overview

```{r overview}
rows <- list()
if ("rna" %in% obj$layers_present)
  rows[[length(rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
    Layer = "RNA-Seq", Features = nrow(obj$rna$counts), Samples = ncol(obj$rna$counts))
if ("variants" %in% obj$layers_present)
  rows[[length(rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
    Layer = "Variants (WGS)", Features = ncol(obj$variants$binary),
    Samples = nrow(obj$variants$binary))
if ("methylation" %in% obj$layers_present)
  rows[[length(rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
    Layer = "Methylation", Features = nrow(obj$methylation$beta),
    Samples = ncol(obj$methylation$beta))
knitr::kable(do.call(rbind, rows), caption = "Data layers loaded into OmicsLens")
```

```{r pca, eval="rna" %in% obj$layers_present && !is.null(obj$rna$normalized), fig.cap="RNA-Seq PCA (VST-normalised)"}
mat <- obj$rna$normalized
pca <- prcomp(t(mat), scale. = FALSE)
df  <- as.data.frame(pca$x[,1:2])
df$sample <- rownames(df)
pct <- round(summary(pca)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100, 1)
if (!is.null(obj$results$groups)) df$Group <- obj$results$groups[df$sample]
grp_col <- if ("Group" %in% colnames(df)) df$Group else NULL
p <- ggplot(df, aes(PC1, PC2, label = sample)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = grp_col), size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pct[1], "%)"), y = paste0("PC2 (", pct[2], "%)"),
       title = "RNA-Seq PCA", color = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
ggplotly(p)
```

---

# 2. MOFA2 Integration {.tabset}

```{r mofa-check, results='asis', eval=!has_mofa}
cat("> **Note:** MOFA2 model not found. Run `omicslens_integrate()` to generate factors.\n")
```

## Variance Explained

```{r var-exp, eval=has_mofa}
ve  <- obj$results$mofa$variance_explained$r2_per_factor[[1]]
df  <- as.data.frame(ve)
df$Factor <- factor(paste0("F", seq_len(nrow(df))), levels = paste0("F", seq_len(nrow(df))))
df_long <- tidyr::pivot_longer(df, -Factor, names_to = "View", values_to = "VarExp")
ggplot(df_long, aes(Factor, VarExp, fill = View)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(y = "Variance Explained (%)", title = "Variance explained per factor per view") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")
```

## Factor Scatter

```{r factor-scatter, eval=has_mofa, fig.cap="MOFA2 Factor 1 vs Factor 2"}
omicslens_plot_factors(obj)
```

## Top Weights

```{r weights, eval=has_mofa}
for (view in names(obj$results$mofa$weights)) {
  wraw <- obj$results$mofa$weights[[view]]
  # Weights may be a matrix directly or a list-per-group
  wmat <- if (is.matrix(wraw)) wraw else wraw[[1]]
  vals <- sort(abs(wmat[, 1]), decreasing = TRUE)
  top  <- head(vals, 20)
  df   <- data.frame(Feature = names(top), AbsWeight = as.numeric(top))
  df   <- df[order(df$AbsWeight), ]
  df$Feature <- factor(df$Feature, levels = df$Feature)
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(AbsWeight, Feature)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#3498db") +
    labs(x = "|Weight|", y = NULL,
         title = paste("Top 20 feature weights — Factor 1 |", view)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
  print(p)
}
```

---

# 3. Differential Expression {.tabset}

```{r de-check, results='asis', eval=!has_de}
cat("> **Note:** DE results not found. Run `omicslens_analyze()` first.\n")
```

## Volcano Plot

```{r volcano, eval=has_de}
ggplotly(omicslens_plot_de(obj))
```

## Heatmap

```{r heatmap, eval=has_de && !is.null(obj$rna$normalized), fig.height=8}
top30 <- head(obj$results$de$gene[!is.na(obj$results$de$padj)], 30)
mat   <- t(scale(t(obj$rna$normalized[top30, ])))
ann   <- if (!is.null(obj$results$groups)) data.frame(Group = obj$results$groups, row.names = names(obj$results$groups)) else NULL
pheatmap::pheatmap(mat, annotation_col = ann, show_colnames = FALSE,
                    color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166ac","white","#d73027"))(100),
                    main = "Top 30 DE genes (row-scaled VST)")
```

## Results Table

```{r de-table, eval=has_de}
de_show <- obj$results$de[!is.na(obj$results$de$padj),
                            c("gene","baseMean","log2FoldChange","pvalue","padj")]
DT::datatable(de_show, rownames = FALSE, filter = "top",
          options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE)) |>
  DT::formatRound(c("baseMean","log2FoldChange","pvalue","padj"), 4) |>
  DT::formatStyle("padj",
              backgroundColor = DT::styleInterval(0.05, c("#abebc6","white")))
```

---

# 4. Pathway Enrichment

```{r gsea-check, results='asis', eval=!has_gsea}
cat("> **Note:** GSEA results not found. Run `omicslens_analyze()` first.\n")
```

```{r gsea, eval=has_gsea, fig.height=8}
omicslens_plot_gsea(obj, top_n = 20)
```

```{r gsea-table, eval=has_gsea}
gsea_show <- as.data.frame(obj$results$gsea)[, c("pathway","NES","pval","padj","size")]
DT::datatable(gsea_show, rownames = FALSE, filter = "top",
          options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE)) |>
  DT::formatRound(c("NES","pval","padj"), 4)
```

---

# 5. Differentially Methylated Regions

```{r dmr-check, results='asis', eval=!has_dmr}
cat("> **Note:** DMR results not available. Run `omicslens_analyze()` with a methylation layer.\n")
```

```{r dmr, eval=has_dmr}
DT::datatable(obj$results$dmr, rownames = FALSE,
          options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE))
```

---

# 6. Survival Analysis

```{r surv-check, results='asis', eval=!has_survival}
cat("> **Note:** Survival results not found. Provide `time_os` and `event` columns in metadata.\n")
```

```{r survival, eval=has_survival, fig.height=7}
print(omicslens_plot_survival(obj))
```

```{r cox, eval=has_survival}
cat("**Cox proportional hazards model summary:**\n\n")
print(summary(obj$results$survival$cox))
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```

---

*Generated by [OmicsLens](https://github.com/priyanshpathak/OmicsLens)*
